sandboxFiles.name: Q3 Strategy Deck.gslides
sandboxFiles.title: I updated Q3 Strategy Deck
sandboxFiles.content:
# Q3 Product Strategy & Growth Deck

> **Product-Led Expansion**: Scaling creator micro-apps and collaborative workspace spaces across core enterprise cohorts.

- **Quarterly Target**: Reaching 100K active creator spaces with `1.42 K-Factor` viral referral loops.
- **Revenue Goal**: Hitting $2.4M ARR milestone through Pro subscription tier unlocks.

---

# Creator Activation & Onboarding

## Zero-Friction FTUE

- **3-Step Activation**: Express interest setup gets creators to their first live app in `< 42 seconds`.
- **Interactive Component Kits**: 50+ pre-built canvas modules for rapid prototyping and live publishing.

## Referral Incentives

- **Bi-Directional Pro Unlocks**: Inviting 3 team members unlocks advanced AI co-pilot features.
- **Community Creator Showcase**: Featured creator apps highlighted in public discovery gallery.
